login.continueAsGuest: Continue as guest to view parking map
login.brandTitle: Smart parking management, right at your fingertips.

register.errorEmptyFields: Please fill in all required fields.
register.errorRegister: Failed to register. Email may already exist.
register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Sign up to get started
register.heroSubtitle: Join the smart parking management system and start managing your spaces with ease.
register.brandTagline: © 2026 Parking Management System. All rights reserved.

home.heroDesc: Experience the future of urban parking. Real-time availability, instant booking, and seamless check-in — all from your phone.
home.featDesc: Built with cutting-edge technology to deliver a seamless parking experience
home.feat1Desc: Interactive map showing exact slot availability across all floors and zones, updated every second.
home.feat2Desc: Reserve your spot in seconds from anywhere. Skip the lines and guarantee your space before arriving.
home.feat3Desc: Advanced recognition technology ensures secure, contactless entry and exit for your vehicle 24/7.
home.feat4Desc: Flexible payment options including VNPay QR, cash, and digital wallets with transparent pricing.
home.step1Desc: Browse the real-time parking map to find available spaces on any floor.
home.step2Desc: Select your spot, choose your time slot, and confirm your reservation in seconds.
home.step3Desc: The system uses cameras for automatic plate recognition and QR integration. No tickets needed.
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of drivers who have already upgraded their parking experience. Sign up today and get instant access.
home.supportMsg: Need help booking? Contact our operations team for fast and accurate advice.

lookup.title: Forgot where you parked?
lookup.description: Just enter your license plate and the system will locate the exact floor and parking slot in the building for both members and walk-in drivers.
lookup.cardSubtitle: Enter a license plate to locate it now
lookup.notFound: No parked vehicle was found for this license plate.

enterPlate.title: Enter license plate
enterPlate.desc: Type the correct plate number of the vehicle you parked.

locate.title: Location system
locate.desc: The system scans the building to find the matching floor and slot.

navigate.title: Navigate directly
navigate.desc: View the exact location on the live parking map.

intro.featMapDesc: Experience an interactive, real-time map displaying exact slot availability across multiple floors and zones.
intro.featBookDesc: Reserve your parking spot instantly from anywhere. Skip the lines and guarantee your space before you even arrive.
intro.featSecureDesc: Advanced Automatic License Plate Recognition ensures secure entry and exit, protecting your vehicle 24/7.
intro.featMobileDesc: Our responsive design guarantees a seamless experience whether you are on your desktop, tablet, or mobile phone.
intro.introDesc: PBMS (Parking Building Management System) revolutionizes the way you park. We integrate cutting-edge AI recognition, real-time mapping, and automated payments to deliver a frictionless parking experience.
intro.whyChooseUsDesc: Discover the core features that power our system
intro.readyDesc: Join thousands of users who have already upgraded their parking experience. Register today and get immediate access to our premium facilities.

paymentSuccess.walletDesc: Your wallet top-up has been confirmed. Your wallet balance will be updated shortly.
paymentSuccess.membershipDesc: Your Membership has been successfully activated. Use the Membership QR code at entry; the actual license plate will be captured at the gate.
paymentSuccess.membershipPassDesc: The system will use your Membership at entry and exit gates based on your registered information.
paymentSuccess.depositDesc: Your invoice has been verified. The 15-minute reservation ticket is activated.
paymentSuccess.exitDesc: Parking invoice completed. The barrier gate will automatically open when your vehicle approaches the exit.
paymentSuccess.graceTimeDesc: Please move your vehicle out of the parking lot before the grace period expires to avoid additional fees.
paymentSuccess.botDesc1: Your transaction has been recorded. The barrier gate is opening.
paymentSuccess.botDesc2: You have completed payment at the toll booth (BOT). Please exit immediately.
paymentSuccess.failedDesc: The payment was canceled or encountered an error from the bank's side.
paymentSuccess.timeoutDesc: The system hasn't received a response from VNPay yet. Please check your bank account balance or transaction history.
